Our Arsenal

The Intelligence You Need. The Edge You Deserve.

Stock Research & Analysis

In-depth fundamental and technical research on specific stocks with actionable insights for informed decision-making.

Derivative Trading Advisory

05

Market Research Reports

Regular market insights, sector analysis, and thematic research to keep you informed on evolving opportunities and risks.

About House of Trade

Research-Driven Intelligence for the Serious Trader

House of Trade is a SEBI-registered research platform delivering institutional-grade stock research, derivative strategies, and risk-based recommendations for retail traders who demand more than generic tips.

  • We analyze stocks with proprietary HEAT Score™ framework — not guesswork
  • We deliver BUY/SELL/HOLD calls with clear entry, exit, and risk parameters
  • We provide derivative war plans with Greeks analysis and probability metrics
  • We focus on asymmetric risk-reward setups and position sizing discipline
  • We bring institutional intelligence to retail traders — process always beats impulse
Talk to Our Research Team

Yrs in Markets
Meet the Strategy Manager

Sushant Dighe

Strategy Manager — House of Trade

Sushant brings hands-on experience in equity markets, derivatives, and options selling strategies. With a deep focus on risk-first thinking, he helps investors move from confusion to clarity through disciplined, research-backed decisions.

Service Plans
Core Services

Warfare, Not Guesswork

Every recommendation is battle-tested. Every strategy is research-backed. Every call is accountable.

High-Conviction Stock Picks

Every stock scored 0-100 on our proprietary HEAT Score™ — quality research, not quantity spam.

Derivative War Plans

Options strategies with Greeks analysis, probability calculations, and clear risk-reward setups.

Risk-Based Selection

Stock recommendations calibrated to your risk profile — conservative, balanced, or aggressive.

Full Transparency

Quarterly P&L reports on every recommendation. Win rate disclosed. No hiding behind disclaimers.

The Process

From Research to Recommendation. In 4 Steps.

How we deliver institutional-grade intelligence to your trading desk.

1

Choose Your Plan

Select THE TRADING FLOOR, THE WAR ROOM, or THE BOARDROOM based on your trading style and capital.

2

Risk Profiling

We assess your risk appetite and capital allocation to tailor stock recommendations to your profile.

3

Receive Research Intelligence

Get high-conviction stock ideas with HEAT Scores, entry/exit levels, and derivative war plans via WhatsApp.

4

Execute with Confidence

Every recommendation comes with clear risk parameters. You decide. We provide the intelligence.

The Problem We Solve

Confused Whether to Hold or Sell?

Most investors hold stocks they do not understand, sit on unexplained losses, and make fear-driven decisions. There is a better way.

📉

Should I average down or cut losses?

You have been holding a falling stock. We help you evaluate objectively without emotion.

🌀

I have 30 stocks and do not know what I own.

Over-diversification creates noise. We identify what is redundant and what truly matters.

📱

Every Telegram tip is different. Who do I trust?

You deserve research-backed insights aligned with your situation, not someone else's.

Get Research-Backed Recommendations

Disclaimer

Investments in securities market are subject to market risks. Read all related documents carefully before investing. We provide stock research and recommendations only — we do NOT offer portfolio management or review services. Registration granted by SEBI does not guarantee performance or returns. Past performance is not indicative of future results.

Investor Charter

We provide unbiased, research-based insights. Investors must evaluate their own risk profile before investing. Our goal is transparent, ethical, and compliance-driven guidance to help investors make informed decisions.

Terms & Conditions

Content is for informational purposes only. No guarantee of accuracy or returns is made. Users are responsible for their own financial decisions. House of Trade shall not be liable for any losses arising from reliance on this information.

📋 Charge Rates

STT (Options Sell): 0.0625% of sell premium
Exchange Charges: 0.05% of total turnover
Brokerage: ₹40 per lot
GST, SEBI fees, Stamp Duty: Not included
